About Me

A quick introduction before the syllabus begins.

I'm Subatha, a III year B.E Computer Science Engineering student at Sardar Raja College of Engineering, Tenkasi. I enjoy solving problems with code and turning everyday campus struggles — like clashing class schedules — into working software. Currently sharpening my skills in Python, C and Java, and building projects that combine logic with real-world usefulness.

Featured Project

The project this whole portfolio is timetabled after.

🗓️ Smart Timetable Scheduler
